cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1933 · 한글 統一
cover.subtitle:
맞춤법 통일안에서
조선어학회 사건까지.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean male scholar in dark Western suit and round glasses, hair neatly parted, holding an open thick manuscript stack with handwritten characters (no readable letters — just abstract scribble lines), profile view writing at a low wooden desk. Background: tall wooden bookcase with bound books and an oil lamp, paper texture. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on lamp glow. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 이극로
items.desc: 통일안 주도, 학회 사건 핵심 검거.

items.name: 최현배
items.desc: 통일안 제정 참여, 학회 사건 옥고.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 조선어 연구회→조선어학회 개칭(1931), 한글 맞춤법 통일안(1933), 표준어 사정(1936), 학회 사건 인물(이극로·최현배·이윤재·한징)과 우리말 큰사전 완간 시기가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small ink brush silhouette suggesting writing. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
